title: The Gallant Legion
writer: Gerald Drayson Adams, John K. Butler, Gerald Geraghty
actors: Bill Elliott, Lorna Gray, Joseph Schildkraut
plot: When power-hungry Faulkner and Laroux want to divide Texas into smaller sections, instead of allowing it to enter the Union as a single state, Gary Conway and the Texas Rangers must step in to thwart their chicanery.
